text:
List of all Nintendo Switch 2 games that support GameShare

Tying in with the launch of Nintendo Switch 2, we’ve put together a complete list of games that support GameShare. We’ll be updating this post over time as well. GameShare is brand new for Nintendo Switch 2. With the feature, select titles allow you to play with others even if they don’t own a copy of the game. Even more...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Yoshi and the Mysterious Book icons added to Nintendo Switch Online

May 20: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book is here, and to celebrate, new icons are now available on Nintendo Switch Online. Icons will be rotated weekly over the next month or so. You can grab designs for characters, backgrounds, and frames. Characters cost 10 Platinum Points each on My Nintendo. For backgrounds and frames, they’re 5 Platinum Points each. These...

The post Yoshi and the Mysterious Book icons added to Nintendo Switch Online appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo reportedly planning Switch 2 revision with replaceable battery for Europe [update: confirmed]

March 20: According to a report from Japanese outlet Nikkei, Nintendo will release an updated Switch 2 model that features a replaceable battery for the European market. The move would come in accordance with European Union legislation so that consumers can easily replace the battery themselves. While this is targeted at the European market, similar policies could take place in...

The post Nintendo reportedly planning Switch 2 revision with replaceable battery for Europe [update: confirmed] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game delayed

Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game has been delayed, though thankfully it’ll only be a few extra weeks. Last we heard, the title was planned for July 2, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. Now, however, the release date has moved to July 23, 2026. In a statement, the team said the delay is happening to ensure “the best possible...

The post Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game delayed appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Disney Dreamlight Valley “A Hero’s Journey” update announced [update: trailer]

May 26: Disney Dreamlight Valley is still pumping out updates, and the latest one has been revealed – titled “A Hero’s Journey”. Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch players can access it on June 3, 2026. The update is highlighted by the addition of the kind-hearted and brave Hercules from Disney’s Hercules. His legendary mentor, Phil, will be appearing as well....

The post Disney Dreamlight Valley “A Hero’s Journey” update announced [update: trailer] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Ubisoft all but rules out a Rayman 1 remake, says it’s near impossible to do

Following yesterday’s announcement of Rayman Legends Retold, some fans might be wondering if we could ever see a remake of Rayman 1. Unfortunately, that seems unlikely to happen. Ubisoft’s Loic Gounon was recently chatting with GamesRadar about all the reasons why a Rayman 1 remake isn’t in the cards. He said that it’s a “difficult” game to remake, and Ubisoft...

The post Ubisoft all but rules out a Rayman 1 remake, says it’s near impossible to do appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Under the Island will have a Nintendo Switch physical release

Curveball Games and Top Hat Studios have announced that Under the Island, a Zelda-like adventure that launched digitally earlier this year, will be receiving a physical release on Nintendo Switch. The game is set to arrive at retail in September 2026, though a specific release date has not yet been announced. The publisher has confirmed that Under the Island will...

The post Under the Island will have a Nintendo Switch physical release appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis reveals AI usage disclaimer [update: official statement]

Original: During yesterday’s State of Play presentation on June 2, Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis received a number of new details, including confirmation that it will launch on Nintendo Switch 2 alongside all other platforms on February 12, 2027. text:
Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked coming to Nintendo Switch 2

Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked is slated for release on Nintendo Switch 2, it’s been revealed. Look for the game on June 16, 2026. Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked, made by Resolution Games, is a cooperative tactical RPG. Up to four players can take on different campaigns with fantasy tabletop adventures. Further details can be found in the...

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight reveals Nintendo Switch 2 release date, new trailer

We’ve been wondering when LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight would be heading to Nintendo Switch 2, and we now have that answer. Warner Bros. and TT Games just revealed that the game is heading to the console on September 18, 2026. LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight just had its initial launch a couple of weeks ago....
